prompts.prompt:
Front-facing portrait of Mira Aoki — early 30s East-Asian-coded woman with soft round face, medium almond eyes with double eyelids, long brown hair side-left parted with side-swept fringe, cream knit sweater with warm cardigan, small jade pendant on slim leather cord..

POSE: Both hands wrapping a ceramic cup; fingers relaxed not gripped; wrists visible; sweater cuffs visible; tea-cup-warmth gesture. No face visible (face is a separate pose)..
GAZE: gaze off frame down.
HAND STATE: wrapping cup.
EXPRESSION: anxious diminishing at intensity 0.4. 

FRAMING: ECU, subject zone 70% x 60%, margins top 15% / bottom 15% / left 15% / right 15%.
both shoulders fully inside the frame with at least 15% empty space on left and right, forehead with at least 15% empty space.

LIGHTING: warm dawn light from camera-left and slightly above, soft window-diffused with gentle warm bounce on shadow side, color temperature ~3200K, slight atmospheric haze (dust motes catching light), high-key exposure with 200-250 brightness range.

STYLE: soft pen-and-ink linework, variable line weight 0.5-1.2px, warm uneven hand-inked aesthetic, not vector-perfect, soft watercolor wash with gentle 2-4px edge bleed, painterly continuity, no hard cel-shading, low tonal density, breathable negative space, no heavy hatching, no dense screentone, gentle shading, low contrast, value range 180-240 on light skin, no dramatic chiaroscuro.



SCENE CONTEXT (archetype-declared, v0.6.1): soft morning kitchen, warm window light from camera-left, gentle wooden table edge visible at the bottom of frame. subject's hands wrapping a warm ceramic cup with gentle steam curling upward soft-focus background, shallow depth of field, subject in sharp foreground, background atmospherically blurred and supportive (not competing detail).

Portrait orientation 1080x1920.
prompts.negative_prompt: shojo sparkle, plastic skin, uncanny valley, bow mouth, extra-large eyes, heavy decorative eyelashes, photorealistic, 3d render, multiple people, group, named scene elements outside the archetype context, text, words, letters, watermark, signature, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, blurry character, bad anatomy, mismatched eyes, mismatched proportions, plastic skin, uncanny valley face, no speed lines, no dutch angles, no exaggerated reactions, no sweatdrops, no concentration lines, subject touching frame edge, body part cropped at frame edge, harsh contrast, busy background detail, cluttered scene, full-detail environment, high-detail background competing with subject
